sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: Vibecoders.la ("we", "our" or "the Platform") is a community that connects developers and creators who build with vibe coding tools. Your privacy is important to us. This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal information.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect the following types of information:
list: Account information: When you sign in with Google, we receive your name, email address and profile photo.
Profile information: The username you choose for your public page at vibecoders.la.
Technical information: Device, browser and operating system data to improve your experience.
Usage information: How you interact with the platform to improve our services.

sections.title: 3. Google Authentication
sections.content: We use Google Sign-In to offer you a secure experience without needing to create passwords. We only access your basic profile information (name, email and photo). We do not access your Google Drive, contacts, calendar or any other Google service.

sections.title: 4. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to:
list: Create and maintain your account at vibecoders.la
Allow you to reserve your personalized page
Communicate with you about service updates
Improve and personalize your experience
Prevent fraud and misuse

sections.title: 5. Storage and Security
sections.content: Your information is stored securely on protected servers. We use Supabase as our infrastructure provider, which complies with industry security standards. We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data.

sections.title: 6. Sharing Information
sections.content: We do not sell or rent your personal information. We only share data with:
list: Essential service providers (hosting, authentication)
When required by law
With your explicit consent

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to:
list: Access your personal data
Correct incorrect information
Delete your account and data
Export your data
sections.footer: Pour exercer vos droits d'accès, de rectification ou de suppression de vos données (RGPD 15-22 / LGPD 18), vous pouvez nous écrire à privacy@vibecoders.la.

sections.title: 8. Cookies
sections.content: We use essential cookies for site functionality and authentication. We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising purposes.

sections.title: 9. Changes to this Policy
sections.content: We may update this policy occasionally. We will notify you of significant changes by email or through a notice on the platform.

sections.title: 10. Contact
sections.content: For privacy questions:

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using vibecoders.la, you accept these terms of service. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

sections.title: 2. Description of Service
sections.content: Vibecoders.la is a community for developers and creators who build digital products using artificial intelligence tools and vibe coding. We offer:
list: Personalized profile pages
Vibecoders community directory
Resources and connections for creators

sections.title: 3. Registration and Account
sections.content: By registering, you agree that:
list: You must provide truthful information when registering
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account
You must be at least 13 years old
One person may have only one account

sections.title: 4. Usernames
sections.content: Regarding usernames:
list: Usernames must be appropriate and not offensive
You cannot use names that infringe trademarks
You cannot impersonate other people or entities
We reserve the right to reclaim inactive usernames or those that violate these policies

sections.title: 5. Acceptable Use
sections.content: You agree not to:
list: Violate applicable laws or regulations
Publish offensive, defamatory or illegal content
Attempt to access other users' accounts
Interfere with the platform's operation
Use the platform for spam or fraudulent activities

sections.title: 6. Intellectual Property
sections.content: Regarding intellectual property:
list: Content you publish remains yours
You grant us license to display your content on the platform
Respect the intellectual property rights of third parties
The design and code of vibecoders.la are our property

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: The platform is provided "as is". We do not guarantee continuous or error-free availability. We are not responsible for:
list: Losses arising from the use of the platform
Content published by other users
Service interruptions

sections.title: 8. Service Modifications
sections.content: We may modify, suspend or discontinue any aspect of the service at any time. We will notify you of significant changes with reasonable notice.

sections.title: 9. Termination
sections.content: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You can delete your account at any time from your profile.

sections.title: 10. Applicable Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the applicable laws in the jurisdiction where vibecoders.la operates.

sections.title: 11. Contact
sections.content: For questions about these terms:

sections.title: 1. Que sont les cookies ?
sections.content: Les cookies sont de petits fichiers texte placés sur votre appareil pour collecter des informations standard de journal Internet et de comportement. Lorsque vous visitez vibecoders.la, nous pouvons collecter des informations automatiquement via des cookies.

sections.title: 2. Comment utilisons-nous les cookies ?
sections.content: Nous utilisons des cookies pour :
list: Maintenir votre session active en toute sécurité.
Comprendre comment vous utilisez et naviguez sur notre plateforme (en utilisant Microsoft Clarity).
Enregistrer vos préférences, telles que la langue ou le thème visuel.

sections.title: 3. Types de cookies que nous utilisons
sections.content: Notre plateforme utilise principalement :
list: Essentiels : Nécessaires au fonctionnement technique de la plateforme et à l'authentification.

Analytiques : Nous utilisons Microsoft Clarity pour enregistrer des statistiques d'utilisation (clics, navigation, cartes de chaleur) de manière anonyme, afin d'améliorer l'expérience produit. Cela nécessite des cookies tiers exploités par Microsoft.

sections.title: 4. Contrôle des cookies
sections.content: Depuis le panneau 'Confidentialité' dans les paramètres de votre compte, vous pouvez à tout moment désactiver la collecte de données por Microsoft Clarity. De plus, vous pouvez configurer votre navigateur pour refuser tous les cookies, bien que cela puisse affecter le fonctionnement de la plateforme.
